Contact Roger ŌĆŗ ŌĆŗ ŌĆŗ ŌĆŗ ŌĆŗ *IMPORTANT* Please sign the consent form on this page to allow Sir Roger Gale M.P. to make representations on your behalf and receive any and such information as may be relevant to your concerns. If you need to contact Roger please complete the contact form on this page. However, if you need to contact Roger's office in connection with a communication that you have already started, then please either telephone the office in Birchington on 01843 848588 or e-Mail to either galerj@parliament.uk or suzy@galemail.com ŌĆŗ When contacting Roge r or Suzy, please always put your full name, your address and also your contact telephone number(s). Have you ever been in contact with Roger before? * Have your contact details changed? * Send YOUR M.P. At Your Service SIR ROGER GALE Post-Pandemic your MP, Sir Roger Gale (Herne Bay and Sandwich, including West Thanet) continues to hold face to face surgery appointments at our office in Birchington, where these are necessary and appropriate. ŌĆŗ All Saturday surgeries are now held at the Birchington office - most Saturday mornings at 215a Canterbury Road, Birchington, CT7 9AH. Please ring 01843 848588 (mornings from 10 a.m.) for an appointment etc. ŌĆŗ Roger is also very willing to conduct telephone consultations (which very often expedite matters rather than having to wait for a formal “advice surgery”). ŌĆŗ Should you wish to speak to Roger personally then please email Suzy on suzy@galemail.com - she will be pleased to organise a telephone or ZOOM appointment for you. Alternatively, click on the form below and send in full details. ŌĆŗ Ring: 01843 848588 (a.m. from 10am) Web: www.rogergale.com Email: galerj@parliament.uk Write: House of Commons Westminster London SW1A 0AA Anchor 1 The GDPR new law comes into effect in May 2018 which affects the way we keep information. We send out emails to my constituents but my office will never pass on your details to a third party unless you have specifically asked for my assistance in a particular matter. Should you wish to be removed from our mailing lists please do let us know your details by post or email - together with your full name and postal address - and we will confirm that your details have been removed.
